# Legacy Parity Fixtures

This directory stores fixture manifests used by `moodbar-core` parity tests.

Each `*.json` manifest points to:
- `input_audio`: audio file used as test input.
- `expected_mood`: moodbar bytes generated by the legacy C++ binary.
- `options`: analysis options used during generation.
- `max_mean_abs_diff` / `max_abs_diff`: allowed byte-diff tolerances.

Generate a fixture after building the legacy binary:

```bash
python3 scripts/generate_legacy_fixture.py \
  --name tri_band \
  --legacy-bin ./build/moodbar
```

Parity test command:

```bash
cargo test -p moodbar-core --test legacy_parity
```

If no fixture manifests exist, the parity test exits successfully and reports it was skipped.
